sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n89473" key="proska/qisis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσκάθ-ῐσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n89473.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sitting by</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">near</tr_>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">προκ-</ref> </xr> in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.166a</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
